findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 47. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: North Carolina state seal/emblem missing from HTML header
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 displays the official North Carolina state seal centered at the top of the letterhead. The HTML rendering omits this image entirely.

findings.description: Handwritten signature of Judith A. Wehner missing from HTML
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows a handwritten cursive signature above the printed name 'Judith A. Wehner'. The HTML rendering shows only the printed name with no signature image.

findings.description: The North Carolina state seal image present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML — there is no tag for it.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 displays the official North Carolina state seal between the header officials and the 'NORTH CAROLINA / Environmental Quality' text. The HTML contains no tag anywhere in the document.
